steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The rental cost has two parts: a flat fee of \$850 for the first 2 hours, plus \$30 for each additional hour beyond those 2 hours.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: With $t$ total hours ($t \gt 2$), the extra hours are $(t - 2)$. Total cost = $850 + 30(t - 2)$. Setting this equal to \$1,030: $850 + 30(t - 2) = 1{,}030$.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Verify structure: the \$850 is fixed, not multiplied by $t$ or $2t$. The extra charge applies only to hours beyond 2, i.e., $(t-2)$ hours, not $2t$ hours.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• A ${850}(t - 2) + 30t = 1{,}030$: multiplies the flat fee by $(t-2)$, which is incorrect. Eliminated.
  • B ${850}(2t) + 30t = 1{,}030$: multiplies the flat fee by $2t$, which is incorrect. Eliminated.
  • C $850 + 30(t - 2) = 1{,}030$: flat \$850 plus \$30 per extra hour ✓. That confirms C is correct.
  • D $850 + 30(2t) = 1{,}030$: uses $2t$ instead of $(t - 2)$ for the extra hours. Eliminated.
